name: Poached Eggs in Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 9 medium tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
1/2 cup shredded cheddar or mozzarella cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a heavy 10-inch skillet over medium-low heat.
2. Add onion and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add tomatoes, basil, salt, and pepper; bring to a boil.
4. If using canned tomatoes, crush them with a potato masher.
5. Increase heat to medium-high and cook, stirring frequently, until most of the liquid has evaporated, 15-20 minutes for fresh tomatoes (about 15 minutes for canned tomatoes).
6. Use the back of a large spoon to create 8 wells in the sauce.
7. Carefully break one egg into each well. Season eggs with salt and pepper.
8. Cover and simmer over low heat until eggs are poached to desired doneness, 6-8 minutes.
9. Remove from heat. Sprinkle cheese over eggs; cover skillet and let stand until cheese is melted, about 1 minute.
10. Gently spoon sauce and eggs over toast. Serve immediately.
